chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1993 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.8558/2021 2. For hearing of main case 07.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Salman, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General The grievance in the present matter is demand notice alleged to have been issued devoid of adjudication, show cause notice etc. Learned counsel for respondent department states that said notice is being withdrawn forthwith, however, leaving the department at liberty to initiate appropriate proceedings, if permissible under the law. Counsel for the petitioner states that it may be just and proper for the petition to be disposed of in terms as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
